name: Rogers Capital
message: https://www.zoominfo.com/c/rogers-capital-ltd/444888383 https://rogerscapital.mu/ Mauritian company offering integrated financial and technology solutions, including corporate/trust services (fiduciary), IT/telecoms, and consumer finance (credit), helping businesses and individuals navigate global financial landscapes with services like fund administration, tech support, and payroll outsourcing. They operate in diverse sectors, leveraging technology and local expertise to serve both the Mauritius International Financial Centre (IFC) and broader global markets. Rogerscapital.mu blatantly disregarded the security of its company and its clients and did not even attempt to resolve the issue, despite the incompetence of its employees.
